source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ 국내 제조인증/2. Infou 콘솔 추가 기술문서/HAD1717MC Detector 성적서.xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Final inspection test report for HAD1717MC flat panel X-ray detector with electrical safety, combination, mechanical, performance, and packing checks.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports product inspection and technical documentation for a flat panel X-ray detector and associated power supply, console software, cables, labels, and accessories.
keyPoints: Device is listed as Flat Panel X-ray Detector and product as HAD1717MC.
Inspection date is 2020.03.12 and date manufactured is 2020.03.02.
Electrical safety tests, combination tests, mechanical measurements, performance tests, and packing checklist sections are included.
Inspector is Ki Dong, KIM and approver is Nam Kyu, Hur.

entities.name: H&abyz Co.,Ltd.
entities.evidence: H&abyz Co.,Ltd. 1F, 2-dong, 41-16 Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-myeon, Cheoin-gu,Yongin-si Gyeonggi-do, Korea

evidence.claim: The report identifies the device as a Flat Panel X-ray Detector and the product as HAD1717MC.
The inspection date is 2020.03.12.
The detector serial number is HAD1717MC2032001.
The power supply serial number is HAD1717PB2032001.
The date manufactured is 2020.03.02.
The supplier product history lists detector model HAD 1717 MC with firmware version 1.0.
The power supply box model code is 01-B-0-01.
The console software model code is 01-G-0-02.
Electrical safety testing included dielectric strength, earthing resistance, power input, earth leakage current, and touch leakage current measurements.
evidence.evidenceText: Dielectric Strength Test ... Earthing Resistance Measurement ... Power Input Measurement ... Earth Leakage Current Measurement ... Touch Leakage Current Measurement

evidence.claim: The dielectric strength test result was 999.9 MΩ and passed.
The earthing resistance measurement result was 0.09 Ω and passed.
The power input measurement showed power consumption of 45.3 VA and passed.
The combination test for detector, power supply, and main cable passed power on/off, wired communication, and image acquisition checks.
evidence.evidenceText: Detector & Power supply & Main cable ... 전원 on/off ... OK,,Pass ... 유선 통신 ... OK,,Pass ... 영상 취득 ... OK,,Pass

evidence.claim: Console software checks included access control, patient information retrieval, image acquisition, image saving, DICOM transmission, DICOM print, zoom, rotation, contrast control, and partial magnification.
evidence.evidenceText: Console Software ... 접근 권한 ... 환자정보 ... 영상이 획득 ... 저장 ... DICOM 서버에 전송 ... DICOM 출력 ... 확대 / 축소 ... 회전 ... 대조도 조절 ... 특정 부분이 확대

evidence.claim: The detector weight result was 3.635 kg against a maximum specification of 3.75 kg and passed.
The detector outline dimensions were 460 mm width, 460 mm height, and 15.4 mm depth, and passed.
The power supply weight result was 1.55 kg against a maximum specification of 1.8 kg and passed.
Performance testing reported total defect pixels result of 13 against maximum 2400 and passed.
MTF and DQE performance tests were reported with pass results.
The report includes a packing check list covering detector labeling, out packing box labeling, main cable, LAN cable, power supply, PSU power cord, and manual.
evidence.evidenceText: 5. Packing Check List ... Labeling Check ... Main Cable ... Lan Cable ... Power Supply ... PSU Power Cord ... Manual

evidence.claim: The inspector is Ki Dong, KIM and the approver is Nam Kyu, Hur.
evidence.evidenceText: 2020.03.12,,,,Inspector :,,'Ki Dong, KIM',,( signature ) ... 2020.03.12,,,,Approver :,,'Nam Kyu, Hur',,( signature )

evidence.claim: The footer identifies H&abyz Co.,Ltd. and form or document code AIF801-3-2(rev.5).

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit regulatory authority such as MFDS is stated in the source text; Korea is inferred from the company address and Korean-language context.
No explicit external standards such as IEC, ISO, or KS are identified in the source text.
Performance section contains '#REF!' for Line_Sensitivity result, indicating spreadsheet extraction or source data quality issue.
AIF801-3-2(rev.5) appears in the footer and may be a form revision rather than the inspection report revision.
